summary: Iteration 272 - Audio Kill-Switch and UI Declutter Testing. All critical requirements PASSED: (1) STOP button visible and functional in top-left corner, (2) Meditation page does NOT auto-play audio on entry, (3) Manual sound toggle works correctly (OFF by default), (4) UtilityDock consolidates bottom-right widgets, (5) Individual floating buttons for CosmicAssistant and CosmicMixer are hidden, (6) Route-based audio cleanup working.
critical_code_review_comments: EmergencyShutOff.js: Well-implemented hard-kill with 10-step audio termination process, proper z-index (99999), and localStorage flags for emergency state
Meditation.js: Sound OFF by default (line 219: soundOn = false), manual toggle with clear title attributes for accessibility
UtilityDock.js: Clean consolidation of Assistant, Mixer, Quick Actions with proper data-testids and draggable positioning
useRouteAudioCleanup.js: Effective route-based cleanup that kills audio on navigation

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All audio kill-switch and UI declutter features working correctly

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 272 tested the Audio Kill-Switch and UI Declutter features. All tests passed: STOP button in top-left (data-testid='emergency-shutoff'), UtilityDock in bottom-right (data-testid='utility-dock', 'utility-dock-toggle', 'utility-dock-assistant', 'utility-dock-mixer', 'utility-dock-command'), Meditation sound toggle (data-testid='guided-sound-toggle') with sound OFF by default, Cafe Settings toggle in bottom-left (data-testid='cafe-settings-toggle'), Nebula toggle (data-testid='nebula-quick-toggle'). Individual CosmicAssistant and CosmicMixer floating triggers are correctly hidden - controlled via UtilityDock.

stop_button_visible.details: STOP button visible at position top=8, left=8 with z-index 99999

stop_button_functional.details: STOP button sets zen_emergency_active=true and zen_audio_muted=true in localStorage, closes all AudioContexts

meditation_no_autoplay.details: No audio auto-playing on meditation page entry

meditation_sound_toggle.details: Manual sound toggle found with title 'Sound Off (tap to play)' by default, changes to 'Sound On (tap to mute)' when clicked

utility_dock_visible.details: UtilityDock visible at position x=1848 (right side), bottom=160px

utility_dock_expands.details: UtilityDock expands to show Assistant, Mixer, Quick Actions buttons when clicked

utility_dock_collapses.details: UtilityDock collapses when X button clicked

cosmic_assistant_hidden.details: Individual CosmicAssistant trigger not found (correctly hidden by hideTrigger prop)

cosmic_mixer_hidden.details: Individual CosmicMixer trigger not found (correctly controlled via UtilityDock)

cafe_settings_visible.details: Cafe Settings toggle visible at position x=16 (left side)

parchment_toggle_visible.details: Parchment toggle visible in bottom-left area

route_audio_cleanup.details: No audio playing after navigating away from meditation room - route cleanup working
